name: cafe-pos
description: Full-stack cafe POS and back-office management system

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cafe/backend build && pnpm --filter @cafe/pos build && pnpm --filter @cafe/admin build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @cafe/backend lint && pnpm --filter @cafe/pos lint && pnpm --filter @cafe/admin lint

author: Saeed Fazelipanah
